entity.label: Adonikam
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Whom the Lord sets up, one of those “which came with Zerubbabel” (Ezra 2:13). His “children,” or retainers, to the number of 666, came up to Jerusalem (8:13).

nodes.label: Adonikam
nodes.description: Whom the Lord sets up, one of those “which came with Zerubbabel” (Ezra 2:13). His “children,” or retainers, to the number of 666, came up to Jerusalem (8:13).

verses.text: The children of Adonikam, six hundred sixty and six.
And of the last sons of Adonikam, whose names are these, Eliphelet, Jeiel, and Shemaiah, and with them threescore males.
The children of Adonikam, six hundred threescore and seven.
